artifacts.layoutPurpose: Deterministic frame/layout source used for audit, dashboard review, and raster rendering.
artifacts.finalPrintPurpose: Canon SELPHY-ready 4x6 raster image used for booth printing.

notes: Keep all critical text, logo, name, and QR content inside the safe margin.
Let background art bleed to the edge for borderless printing.
Use strong contrast; avoid tiny light-blue text on white.
The Twin Card is a wellness identity card, not a medical record.
